new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift -- coordinate team input
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has initiated a non-clinical pay uplift kick-off meeting to align on timing before UCEA communication arrives and summer holidays fill calendars. Kevin needs to review the meeting details and confirm his team's availability and input requirements.
